commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=10a76a9ac2d985f91bcf21cf46860e7dfb9c2b46)
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes Discord fetchVoiceStatusDiscord to return an absent voice-state object on Unknown Voice State/404 errors and adds focused Vitest coverage for active, absent, 404, and unrelated REST failures.

PR surface: Source +31, Tests +80. Total +111 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Source-reproducible only: current main directly returns getGuildVoiceState, so a Discord Unknown Voice State REST error propagates through voiceStatus; no live Discord reproduction was provided.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor/manual PR follow-up because missing real behavior proof remains a human-only merge gate and the code fix should be reviewed on this branch.

target.title: [codex] fix discord missing voice state handling
target.body:
## Summary
- Treat Discord Unknown Voice State/404 lookups as an absent voice state instead of a CLI/gateway error.
- Add focused regression coverage for active, absent, 404, and unrelated REST failure paths.

## Validation
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-discord.config.ts extensions/discord/src/send.guild.test.ts
- node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile /tmp/openclaw-current-main-extensions-test.tsbuildinfo --pretty false
- node --import tsx scripts/plugin-npm-release-check.ts --plugins @openclaw/discord
- node --import tsx scripts/plugin-npm-release-plan.ts --plugins @openclaw/discord
target.author: asock

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
